LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT VUNGLE, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND DISMISS COMPLAINT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, STAY PROCEEDINGS: DEFENDANT VUNGLE, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION OF THE CLAIM ASSERTED IN PLAINTIFF ZAINALI "ZAIN" JAFFER'S COMPLAINT IS GRANTED AND THE ACTION IS STAYED PENDING CONCLUSION OF THE ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2019 Continued To Sep-25-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Complaint Or, In The Alternative, Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Jul-10-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT VUNGLE, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Complaint Or, In The Alternative, Stay Proceedings:

Defendant Vungle, Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration of the claim asserted in Plaintiff Zainali "Zain" Jaffer's complaint is granted and the action is stayed pending conclusion of the arbitration proceedings.

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Defendant Vungle, Inc. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Complaint Or, In The Alternative, Stay Proceedings (Tentative Rulings Part 2 Of 2)
Off Calendar Jul-10-2019 Off Calendar
